name: @waveary/memory
description: Memory extraction, storage, and retrieval primitives for Project Waveary.

scripts.test: node -e "const { readdirSync } = require('node:fs'); const { join } = require('node:path'); const files = readdirSync('dist').filter((entry) => entry.endsWith('.test.js')).map((entry) => join('dist', entry)); if (files.length === 0) { throw new Error('No compiled test files found in dist.'); } require('node:child_process').spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--test', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
